transcript: Customer: Yeah, hi, um, something's wrong with one of my appliances I think. It's been acting up. Dispatcher: I can help with that — can I get your name and the service address? Customer: Oh, uh, hang on, my other line is ringing, can you just figure it out? [call quality degrades]

expected_entities.intent_note: Caller did not provide name, phone, or address; needs clarifying turns
